prompt_text: Top SaaS metrics and subscription analytics for bootstrap and funded founders tools in 2025
response:
# Top SaaS Metrics & Subscription Analytics Tools for 2025

## **Core Metrics Dashboard Platforms**

### **1. Paddle Analytics**
- **Best for:** Recurring revenue tracking across global payments
- **Key features:** Real-time revenue recognition, tax compliance, churn prediction
- **Pricing model:** Varies by revenue
- **Why founders choose it:** Built-in payment processing + analytics

### **2. ChartMogul**
- **Best for:** Subscription-specific metrics
- **Standout metrics:** MRR, ARR, customer lifetime value, expansion revenue
- **Pricing:** Freemium ($0-$995/mo)
- **Bootstrap advantage:** Generous free tier for <$10K MRR

### **3. Stripe Sigma**
- **Best for:** Custom SQL-based analysis
- **Key strength:** Direct access to payment data
- **Pricing:** Included with Stripe (2.9% + $0.30 per transaction)
- **Best if:** You need custom cohort analysis

### **4. Baremetrics**
- **Best for:** All-in-one dashboard
- **Unique feature:** Marketing attribution + SaaS metrics combined
- **Pricing:** Free-$299/mo
- **Ideal for:** Funded teams wanting operational simplicity

## **Advanced Analytics & Insights**

### **5. Amplitude**
- **Best for:** Product analytics + retention cohorts
- **Strong for:** Understanding which features drive retention
- **Pricing:** Free tier available, enterprise pricing
- **Use case:** Finding product-metric correlations

### **6. Mixpanel**
- **Best for:** User behavior analytics
- **Bootstrap-friendly:** Free tier includes 1K events/day
- **Strength:** Retention curves, funnel analysis
- **Pro tip:** Better for B2C/PLG models

### **7. Segment + dbt**
- **Best for:** Data pipeline + custom metrics
- **Why it matters:** Build your own analytics warehouse
- **Pricing:** Segment ($120-$3,200/mo), dbt Cloud (freemium)
- **Best if:** You want complete data ownership

## **Specialized Subscription Tools**

### **8. ProfitWell (Recurly owned)**
- **Best for:** Subscription intelligence + benchmarking
- **Key advantage:** Industry benchmarks (free feature!)
- **Pricing:** Free (with data sharing), paid tiers available
- **Unique:** Dunning management built-in

### **9. Zuora**
- **Best for:** Complex B2B subscriptions + multi-product
- **Enterprise-grade:** Subscription billing + analytics
- **Pricing:** Custom (typically 500K+ ARR minimum)
- **Best if:** You have multiple pricing models

### **10. Fusebill**
- **Best for:** Billing operations + revenue ops
- **Strength:** Credit management, invoice automation
- **Pricing:** $999-$3,999/mo
- **Good for:** Mid-stage companies ($1M-$50M ARR)

## **Affordable/Bootstrap-Specific**

### **11. Grow**
- **Best for:** Real-time dashboards without engineering
- **Pricing:** $499-$1,999/mo
- **Strength:** Beautiful visualizations, Slack/email alerts

### **12. Metabase**
- **Best for:** Self-hosted analytics
- **Cost:** Free (open source)
- **Setup:** Connect your database, build dashboards
- **Best if:** You have technical co-founder

### **13. Google Sheets + Zapier + Script Editor**
- **Cost:** ~$20-30/mo total
- **Reality:** Many bootstrap founders start here
- **Limitation:** Manual data pulls from APIs

## **Critical SaaS Metrics to Track (2025)**

| Metric | Why It Matters | Tool |
|--------|---|---|
| **MRR/ARR Growth Rate** | Fundraising narrative | ChartMogul, Baremetrics |
| **Logo Churn %** | Customer retention health | ProfitWell, ChartMogul |
| **Revenue Churn %** | Contraction analysis | All major tools |
| **CAC Payback Period** | Cash flow health | Baremetrics, custom |
| **LTV:CAC Ratio** | Unit economics |
